source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Calm English product UI with Japanese typography guidance for short headings, table labels, command search, form copy, and restrained status messages.
layout: Soft connection dashboards, compact navigation, 8px radii, pale mistletoe actions, berry-white surfaces, bark-grey borders, and subtle leaf-vein texture tokens.

prompts.label: Transparent mistletoe motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a mistletoe cluster motif for a Morphous design system, isolated full subject, no environment, no text.
Subject: A natural winter mistletoe cluster with pale green oval leaves, soft branching stems, round white berries, and a small bark-grey winter branch segment; botanical accuracy, tactile leaf veins, waxy berries, quiet soft-connection mood.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop leaves, stems, berries, or branch. Keep one cohesive cluster, not a pattern.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves pale green leaves, white berries, bark grey neutrals, and soft winter branch detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no landscape, no vase, no ribbon, no holiday ornaments, no props beyond the small bark-grey branch segment, no decorative background, no text, no watermark, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Mistletoe", derived from the visible transparent mistletoe cluster cutout with pale green oval leaves, white berries, bark grey winter branch neutrals, and soft connection system mood.
Reference use: Extract the palette, texture rhythm, line quality, radius, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible mistletoe motif. Use only motif-derived colors: pale green mistletoe, white berry, bark grey, winter branch neutrals, lichen-like soft green, and restrained connection accents.
Canvas: exact 16:9 wide board, 3840 x 2160 composition, high-resolution 4K-class source image.
Required visible sections with readable headers: Morphous Mistletoe, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Typography: include English UI type guidance and Japanese typography examples; use short readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, 見出し, 本文, ラベル.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, data table, empty/loading/error/success states, token chips, texture swatches, 8px radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples.
Visual details: light winter-white canvas, pale green primary controls, white berry highlights, bark grey borders, soft node-and-stem connection lines, subtle leaf-vein texture, calm product UI grid, crisp component edges, 8px card radii.
Text: keep labels short, large, and readable; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no holiday ornaments, no red ribbon, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of "Morphous Mistletoe".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Mistletoe". It must feel like the same system as the visible light-mode Morphous Mistletoe board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible mistletoe transparent motif and the visible light-mode design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, soft node-and-stem connection language, 8px card radius, component coverage, Japanese typography guidance, spacing, texture, and shadcn/tweakcn product UI structure.
Canvas: exact 16:9 wide board, 3840 x 2160 composition, high-resolution 4K-class source image.
Required visible sections with readable headers: Morphous Mistletoe, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Typography: include English UI type guidance and Japanese typography examples; use short readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, 見出し, 本文, ラベル.
Visual details: deep winter bark background, soft dark moss surfaces, pale green primary controls, white berry highlights, bark grey borders, muted lichen panels, subtle leaf-vein texture, calm product UI grid, crisp component edges, 8px card radii.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, data table, empty/loading/error/success states, token chips, texture swatches, 8px radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples.
Text: keep labels short, large, and readable; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no holiday ornaments, no red ribbon, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of "Morphous Mistletoe".
